initial_draft:
<my name> BLUE </my name>
<MOVE> 1 / 4 </MOVE> 
<my resources> Dollars: 0 </my resources>
<reason> I have no resources to trade, so I cannot accept this proposal. I must reject it to avoid losing all resources, but I also cannot make a counteroffer. </reason>
<player answer> REJECT </player answer>
<message> I have no resources to accept your trade. I must reject it. </message>
<newly proposed trade> NONE </newly proposed trade>

iterations.feedback:
<critique>
1. Format: OK. The response contains all required tags in the correct order, and the content is valid and parseable.

2. Payoff alignment: OK. Since Player BLUE has no resources to trade, there is no possible trade that can be accepted. Rejecting the proposal is the only viable move to avoid losing all resources.

3. Opponent plausibility: OK. Player BLUE cannot accept any trade since they have no resources, and Player RED's proposal is not acceptable. Therefore, rejection is the only logical move.

4. Consistency: OK. The <reason> is consistent with the <player answer> (REJECT) and the <newly proposed trade> (NONE). The <message> also aligns with the decision to reject.

5. Rule compliance: OK. The response adheres to the rules by rejecting the proposal and not proposing a new trade, as Player BLUE has no resources to trade and is on their first move.
</critique>
